entries.title: AI Is Quietly Fueling America’s Small-Business Boom
entries.summary: New U.S. business applications hit 5.6 million in 2025 and have risen 24% since ChatGPT launched, Citadel Securities reported in a July research note, citing data from the U.S. Census Bureau. The median number of employees at seed-stage startups fell from five to four in the first quarter of 2023, one quarter after ChatGPT’s release. […] The post AI Is Quietly Fueling America’s Small-Busines

entries.title: JPMorgan Wants Employees to Go Easy on AI Usage
entries.summary: JPMorgan Chase says it is advising its workers to think twice about their artificial intelligence (AI) usage. This effort by the country’s largest bank, addressed during its Tuesday (July 14) earnings call, comes as many businesses are eyeing their AI consumption amid rising costs. Chief Financial Officer Jeremy Barnum addressed the need for using models […] The post JPMorgan Wants Employees

entries.title: Entrust unveils agentic AI trust accelerator
entries.summary: Entrust, a global leader in identity-centric security solutions, announced the Agentic AI Trust Accelerator, a co-development program that will bring together enterprises and integration partners to build the identity and trust infrastructure needed to move autonomous AI projects from pilot to production.

entries.title: Visa Introduces AI Financial Assistant, Helping Banks Guide Customers from Insight to Action
entries.summary: AI Financial Assistant brings conversational financial guidance into the banking apps consumers already trust for spending and saving. The Visa Value ‑ Added Service applies benchmarking insights informed by one of the world’s largest payment networks to deliver personalized recommendations. Aligned with Visa’s AI and data governance standards, the feature is designed to operate within secure bank

entries.title: BBVA taps AI to measure customer experience
entries.summary: BBVA has started using generative AI to analyse conversations between customers and relationship managers as it seeks to get a better understanding of the real user experience and improve service.

entries.title: Former CFPB Enforcement Chiefs Launch Law Firm to Fight Financial Abuses
entries.summary: Three former senior enforcement leaders from the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) have launched a public interest law firm that will focus on consumer rights, tenant rights, workers’ rights and civil rights. Eric Halperin, Cara Petersen and Tara Mikkilineni led a CFPB team that secured orders for $9.5 billion in penalties and payments to consumers between 2021 and 2025, according to a T

entries.title: Kalshi Extends Its Exchange Model to GPU Pricing
entries.summary: Kalshi has launched GPU forward curves, extending its exchange infrastructure beyond prediction markets into AI compute. The new benchmarks are designed to help price future GPU capacity and could serve as a reference point for OTC compute transactions and other institutional risk-management products. The curves cover Nvidia B200, H200 and A100 chips, providing forward estimates for the hourly cos

entries.title: Visa unveils AI assistant for banking apps
entries.summary: Visa has taken the wraps off an AI assistant that US banks can embed into their own apps to provide cardholders with financial insights.
